texto: Whenever the conviction of God’s Spirit comes there is the softening of the whole nature to obey
autor: but if the obedience is not instant there will come a metallic hardening and a corrupting of the guidance of God.
explicacao: Citação de but if the obedience is not instant there will come a metallic hardening and a corrupting of the guidance of God. sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “Whenever the conviction of God’s Spirit comes there is the softening of the whole nature to obey” articula fe, oswald-chambers, reflexao em registro de fe, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
